reviewer.displayName: Refrigeración Don “DON PEDRO” Pedro ramos mejia

reviews.comment:
La peor atención recibida jamas. Son mas empleados que surtidores y nadie quiere cargarte. Solo hablan y toman cafe. Como estancion es un buen club

(Translated by Google)
The worst service I've ever received. There are more employees than pumps, and no one wants to bother you. They just talk and drink coffee. As a station, it's a good club.
